subcodes.first_line: This is the Book that calleth the people unto God, the Mighty, the All-Wise. Verily, they who have been endowed with insight from God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب یدع الناس الی الله العزیز الحکیم ان الذین  اوتو  بصائر من الله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @station of the Manifestation of God, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
